title: ’Ratta’’ and seven others remanded till July 1
body_lines: Seven men, including YouTuber Rathindu Senaratne alias ‘Ratta’ and National Organizer of ‘Youth for Change’ Lahiru Weerasekara, who were wanted for indulging in violent activities near the Education Ministry and police headquarters, were remanded till July 1.
The court order was issued by Fort Magistrate Thilina Gamage today. (Nimanthi Ranasinghe)
